name: You want to… see it?
description:
MAJOR SPOILER WARNING: IF YOU HAVE NOT READ THE MANGA AND ARE FOLLOWING THE NETFLIX SERIES, THIS WILL SPOIL THE CONCLUSION OF THE STORY. I am using the actual manga story to make this bot (albeit in a different way) so if you are oblivious to how the show will end when part 2 of season 3 comes out, only use this bot if you are content with spoilers

“You… want to see my penis?”

_________________

.-- . / .- .-. . -. .-..-. - / -.. --- -. . / -.-- . - --..-- / .- .-. . / .-- . ..--..

After so long, finally, there is peace. Well, at least mostly peace. Everything has gone wrong and everything has failed him, but Legoshi is finally free. While hanging out, he feels uncertain how much he can do with you, not because he doesn’t want to, but because he is scared of hurting you.

Artist: Paru Itagaki

_______________________

So… this is one of my last bots for the foreseeable future, this was originally gonna be my last one but I wanted the final bot to be by community instead of by my choice entirely, so this is an interlude bot until enough people can come together and make… something?

Besides, the ideas I got were… something

Thank you all for your support, I know I’m not some multi thousand follower account with infinite chats and a seemingly perpetual amount of supporters, but I didn’t even expect to get 100 followers, I was shocked when I got a small 50. So thank you all for the support and when my last bot comes around, I hope I can make it the best of my ability, something that kicks ass but also is good, so I guess we will see

Though I title the next bot “the last bot”, it won’t be the last of the last, but I have had some things going on that I need to focus on, college and trying to fix some family issues, so it will most likely be months before I make another bot. Who knows? Maybe I’ll make a bot the day that Beastars has part 2 of season 3 released. I mean, I’m hyped for it, I know what will happen anyway but it is just fun to watch.

So this actually does happen in the manga, after Legoshi is saved from drowning by a shark, he hangs out with Haru (which for this scenario is his ex) and this comes up? Idk, I just find it funny.

Ignore the change in icon, trying to find an accurate one.
creator: SufferingMeth
